popup.heading: Compliance Confirmation
popup.subheading: Before using staking, earning, or any third-party protocol services through SubWallet, please review and confirm the following:
popup.intro: I represent, acknowledge, and confirm that:
confirmations: I am using this service voluntarily and at my own discretion.
I lawfully own or control the digital assets used.
I am not a sanctioned or prohibited person and am not acting on behalf of any such person.
I will not use this service for money laundering, terrorist financing, sanctions evasion, fraud, or any other unlawful activity.
I understand that staking and blockchain activities involve risks, and that rewards are not guaranteed.
I understand that SubWallet is a non-custodial wallet provider and does not provide investment, legal, tax, financial, or other professional advice.
Where applicable, I have read and agree to the terms of the relevant third-party service provider.
popup.fullTermsPrefix: In addition to the above, I have reviewed the
popup.fullTermsSuffix: and agree to the representations, acknowledgements, disclosures, risk warnings, and other terms set forth therein.
popup.checkbox: I have read, understood, and agree to the above, and confirm that all representations made by me are true, accurate, and complete to the best of my knowledge.
